mapper.sql: id, plan_code, plan_name, description, template_id, template_name, template_snapshot, start_date, end_date, weight_config_id, enable_weight, custom_standard_size, status, total_checks, total_records, total_deduction_score, rating_config_id, statistics_config, created_by, creator_name, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, w.config_name as weight_config_name FROM check_plans p LEFT JOIN class_weight_configs w ON p.weight_config_id = w.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalPlans, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as draftCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgressCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as finishedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as archivedCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_checks), 0) as totalChecks, COALESCE(SUM(total_records), 0) as totalRecords, COALESCE(SUM(total_deduction_score), 0) as totalDeductionScore FROM check_plans WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE check_plans p SET p.total_checks = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_checks WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0), p.total_records = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_records_new WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0), p.total_deduction_score = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_deduction_score), 0) FROM check_records_new WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND deleted = 0), p.updated_at = NOW() WHERE p.id = #{planId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_plans WHERE plan_code LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')
